name: Farfallette Dolci (Fried Bow Wings or Bow Kno
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs, sugar, salt, and flavorings in a bowl.
2. Sift flour onto a clean surface and cut in butter until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
3. Gradually add the egg mixture to the flour, stirring continuously until a smooth dough forms.
4. If the dough is too soft, gradually add more flour until it becomes workable.
5. Divide the dough into four equal pieces and roll each piece out to a thickness of 1/4 inch on a floured surface.
6. Cut the rolled dough with a pastry cutter into strips that are 6 inches long and 1 inch wide.
7. Tie each strip into a loose knot.
8. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C).
9. Carefully lower the tied dough knots into the hot oil using tongs.
10. Fry until golden brown, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
11. Remove the fried dough with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
12. Sprinkle confectioner's sugar over the fried dough while still hot.
Variation:
1. Combine dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, sugar, salt) in a large bowl.
2. Sift lard over the dry mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Knead the dough until smooth.
5. Follow steps 6-12 as above.
